categories.name: Necessary Cookies
categories.description: Essential cookies that enable the website to function properly. These cannot be disabled.

items.name: mindfull_session
items.purpose: Stores your authentication session data to keep you logged in.

items.name: theme-preference
items.purpose: Remembers your dark mode or light mode preference.

items.name: cookie-consent
items.purpose: Remembers your choice regarding our cookie policy.

categories.name: Functional Cookies
categories.description: Cookies that help us remember your settings and provide enhanced features.

items.name: mindfull_users
items.purpose: Simulates a user database for this demo/theme prototype.

items.name: courseProgress
items.purpose: Tracks your completion status for lessons and courses.
